title: Entry Queue Congestion Threshold
summary: Escalate when ingress queues obstruct circulation or exceed target wait times.
steps: Dispatch crowd-flow staff to open overflow stanchions.
Shift one screening lane to Gate B if adjacent capacity is available.
Publish a guest-facing gate update on internal operations channels.
escalationNote: Notify venue security supervisor if queue spillback reaches outer plaza.

title: Accessibility Infrastructure Outage Response
summary: Mobility-impacting elevator failures require immediate dispatch and alternate route coverage.
steps: Dispatch engineering to confirm elevator status and estimated restoration.
Station accessibility staff at the nearest alternate route.
Flag guest services to reroute impacted guests.
escalationNote: Escalate to event operations lead if no restoration estimate is available within five minutes.

title: Guest Mobility Assistance Standard
summary: Guests requesting wheelchair access require direct acknowledgement and escorted support.
steps: Dispatch guest services with a wheelchair-access kit.
Confirm the handoff and route to destination seating.
escalationNote: Escalate to accessibility coordinator if response is delayed beyond three minutes.
